nasb.text: and I will bring them back and they will live in the midst of Jerusalem; and they shall be My people, and I will be their God in truth and righteousness.’

esv.text: and I will bring them to dwell in the midst of Jerusalem. And they shall be my people, and I will be their God, in faithfulness and in righteousness.”

cnv.text: 我要把他們領回來，讓他們住在耶路撒冷；他們要作我的子民，我也要憑著信實和公義作他們的　神。’

ccb.text: 带他们回到耶路撒冷居住。他们要做我的子民，我要做他们信实和公义的上帝。’
